posts.text: Boomers watch as much short form video slop as Gen Z. They just do it on Facebook instead of TikTok.

New 'Real Talk with Zuby' podcast with @Carlos_ROcelote is out today!

We discuss esports, spirituality, cancel culture, victim mentality, the power of belief, and much more.

Watch it here:
piped.video/yuu1GW9vEoU?si=7fv0…

Video
Apparently he's just gone to beat up the Grim Reaper and will be back soon.

I refuse to believe this.


TMZ (@TMZ)

🕊️ Chuck Norris has died at 86. tmz.me/N3EVxQe





— https://nitter.net/TMZ/status/2034992045165879785#m
My little boy growing day by day. 💜

It feels like the overall experience of social media has dropped significantly in the last few months.

It's not unique to this platform, but all of the ones I use.

Am I alone in this sentiment?

This scam was just attempted on me. I can easily see how people fall for this.

Be cautious out there.


Tay 💖 (@tayvano_)

🚨 WARNING (AGAIN)

DPRK threat actors are still rekting way too many of you via their fake Zoom / fake Teams meets.

They're taking over your Telegrams -> using them to rekt all your friends.

They've stolen over $300m via this method already.

Read this. Stop the cycle. 🙏











— https://nitter.net/tayvano_/status/1999942459368104073#m

I'm not sure which is the bigger red flag...

Hating the opposite sex or hating your own sex.
I'm hanging out with my son and nephews every day and embracing the chaos. 😃

What an understatement.


ZUBY: (@ZubyMusic)

'The right' is probably going to fracture over the next decade like how 'the left' fractured over the previous one.



— https://nitter.net/ZubyMusic/status/1895196658625060960#m
People now need 'studies' to believe things that were obvious to everybody 2,000 years ago.

Full episode:
piped.video/vE15JZRaS6A

I had an excellent conversation with former U.S. Army Ranger, pastor, and entrepreneur John Lovell @johnlovell275 about faith, masculinity, modern dating and marriage, Gen Z's challenges, raising boys into men, and much more.

Out today on the 'Real Talk with Zuby' podcast!

Video
Being completely risk averse guarantees you a life of mediocrity at best.
'Mental health' isn't a good excuse to be a bad person.
